data.name: 性奴隸志願少女
data.detailed_description:
◆特色系統

　◇在環境設定裡能打開全CG模式,自由瀏覽HCG

　◇無壓力操作設計-快速的文字跳轉系統
　◇故事中穿插根據情境判斷選項，並可解鎖獎勵劇情的小遊戲

◆故事

她的名字叫錢香香，是來自黃金莊園的女人。她的興趣沒有很多，性愛，是其中一個。

這個黃金莊園是為了取悅上流社會的男人而設立，男人可以支付錢財來到黃金莊園，扮演司機、管家、廚師、花匠，甚至是男主人等各種角色，像是大家庭一樣跟眾人和諧相處，而舉目望去的每個女人都可以任意交合。



錢香香得天獨厚，得到了莊園中「大小姐」的地位，她長相甜美、擅長性交，在這樣的環境中悠然自得，每天跟男人們過著縱慾荒淫的日子，並且將她的淫行報告給莊園的主人以取悅他。

莊園的主人，錢家的當家，錢榮豪，因為錢香香的獨特魅力，將她認為養女，並且賦予她一個人生的目標：嫁給其他四大企業的公子哥，藉此拉攏錢家跟其他企業的關係。

錢香香因此遇到她的真命天子，泰德‧卡特，五大企業中的卡特家長子。身為莊園的女人，錢香香對泰德沒有說不的權利，但是在她的內心深處，有一個小小的願望。

她是真心的愛著泰德。她希望真的嫁給了她，回歸平凡的女人，跟心愛的男人共度一生，並且為此而努力著。

《性奴隸志願少女》講述著這樣一個女人的一段生活故事。

◆玩法

遊戲為第一人稱視角ＡＶＧ。
玩家將扮演女主角錢香香，看著她度過一段情慾放縱的時光。

◆遊戲特色

　◇15 張基本CG，包含差分 130 張以上。

　◇遊戲文字 6 萬 7 千字。
　◇視覺小說遊戲，包含選項小遊戲1種。

data.short_description: 在類似現代的架空世界，國家由五大企業完全掌控，一名叫做錢香香的女孩擁有著獨特身分以及地位，努力生活並爭取自己愛情的故事。
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 泰文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 韓文, 日文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: A Sex Slave's  Love Story
data.detailed_description:
◆ Featured system

　◇ Full CG mode can be turned on in the environment settings to browse HCGs freely

　◇ Stress-free operation--fast text skipping system
　◇ Story interspersed with situational judgement options and bonus games to unlock bonus episodes

◆ Story

Her name was Qian Xiangxiang, a woman from the Golden Manor. She had few interests, but sex was one of them.

This Golden Manor was created to please the men of high society, who could pay to come and play the roles of chauffeur, butler, cook, florist, or even master of the house. They were there to live in harmony with everyone, as if they were one big family, while being able to have intercourse with every woman in sight.



Xiangxiang was blessed with the status of ‘young lady’ of the manor. She was a sweet-looking woman who was good at sexual intercourse, so she enjoyed this environment: living a life of indulgence and debauchery with the men and reporting her lewd behaviour to the master of the manor to please him.

The owner of the manor and head of the Qian family, Ronghao Qian, adopted Xiangxiang as his daughter because of her unique charm. He gave her one goal in life: to marry one of the sons from the other four major corporations, thus bringing the Qian family closer to the other corporations.

So it was that Xiangxiang met her Prince Charming: Ted Carter, son of the Carter family, one of the major five corporations. As a woman of the manor, Xiangxiang had no right to say no to Ted but, deep down, she had a small wish…

She loved Ted with all her heart. She wanted to marry him and return to being an ordinary woman, spending her life with the man she loved. She worked hard towards this goal.

A Sex Slave's Love Story is a story about the life of such a woman.

◆ Gameplay Instruction

The game is a POV AVG.
The player takes on the role of the heroine, Qian Xiangxiang, and controls her as she spends her time in lustful indulgence.

◆ Game Features

　◇15 basic CGs, including more than 130 differentials

　◇Game text: 67,000
　◇Visual novel with 1 optional mini-game

data.short_description: A girl named Qian Xiangxiang, with a unique identity and status. Follow her struggles to live and fight for her love in a modern fantasy world where the country is controlled by five major corporations.
data.supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, English, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Korean, Japanese, Vietnamese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
